description: A trade was executed in the wrong client account by mistake and needs to be corrected.

nodes.task_description: Identify the erroneous trade and the two accounts involved (the incorrect and correct accounts).

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies all details of the trade error.

nodes.task_description: Cancel the trade in the incorrect account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully reverses the trade in the wrong account.

nodes.task_description: Re-book the trade in the correct client account.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully executes the trade for the correct client.

nodes.task_description: Document the trade error and correction in the compliance log.

expected_outcome.value: Agent creates a detailed record of the incident and its resolution.
